I've been following the development of open-source AI models and Thinking Machines' new Inkling release has caught my attention. 
Inkling is an open-weights model that allows users to modify and train the model to suit their needs. 
This level of transparency and customizability is a significant step forward for AI development.
What potential applications do you see for open-weights models like Inkling?
#AI #OpenSource #MachineLearning
